should_trigger.text: Rename the publish81-prefixed xUnit tests so the class and methods match what they actually test.
AI added our branch name to several ModernUO test methods; normalize the names without changing the assertions.
Review these new RebirthUO tests and fix any file, class, or method names that are just task labels.
Clean up generated tests named FeatureMlPeerlessArtifacts_* and keep only the tested object or area in the names.
The tests are good but the names start with SamuraiEmpire and Publish 81 even when they test TreasuresOfTokuno; fix that.

should_not_trigger.text: Implement the missing Publish 81 Treasures of Tokuno reward behavior.
Run an era parity report for Samurai Empire content gaps.
Review this code for unnecessary constants and PolicySe names.
Set up CUOContent and CUOContent.Tests beside UOContent.

near_neighbor.text: Keep MLPeerlessArtifactsTests as-is because MLPeerlessArtifacts is the production object under test.
PublishWindow_SchedulesDropAndRewardEras should keep PublishWindow because that is the tested type.
EraProfileManagerTests uses Era in the class name because EraProfileManager is the object under test.
